---
title: "test_valkyrie_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_valkyrie_empire.py"
loc: 57
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.02
style_score: 3.65
intel_score: 7.01
overall_score: 4.74
---

## Intent
The `test_valkyrie_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestValkyrieEmpire, mock_root, test_scan_no_dead_code, test_scan_detects_dead_code, test_scan_filters_low_confidence, test_scan_ignores_init. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestValkyrieEmpire, mock_root, test_scan_no_dead_code, test_scan_detects_dead_code, test_scan_filters_low_confidence, test_scan_ignores_init. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.valkyrie](file://src.sentinel.wardens.valkyrie)

### Exports
- `TestValkyrieEmpire`
- `mock_root`
- `test_scan_no_dead_code`
- `test_scan_detects_dead_code`
- `test_scan_filters_low_confidence`
- `test_scan_ignores_init`
